content:
I’ve started working on my own Selfhosting Cloud Service, 2 Weeks work to get the basics done.
Programming in Golang, understanding Docker, Caddy and how to use a terminal to do commands 😅 I’ve included AES-256 decryption for datas, a license key to check if a license is valid. Its own right-wing administration. All in one to install all dependencies at install.
Any idea what could add more safety, or features I didn’t planned myself actually?

  submitted by   /u/CaptainPM-Ger
[link]   [comments]
